metadata.description: clawtool: canonical tool layer + multi-agent supervisor for AI coding agents — by Bahadır Arda

plugins.name: clawtool
plugins.description: Canonical tool layer + multi-agent supervisor for AI coding agents. Auto-registers an MCP server on install (no `claude mcp add-json`), biases agent preference toward clawtool's structured-output / timeout-safe / format-aware tools via a loaded skill, exposes `/clawtool` slash commands, and dispatches to Claude Code / Codex / Opencode / Gemini through async BIAM with edge-triggered TaskNotify fan-in. Bundles sandbox profiles (bwrap / sandbox-exec / docker), saved web-UI portals, an MCP scaffolder, and search-first tool discovery. Uninstall removes everything except user data and the binary itself.
